user.title: Connect to Cartesia
user.description: Enter your Cartesia API key. You can find or create it at [play.cartesia.ai/keys](https://play.cartesia.ai/keys).

model.title: Select a voice model
model.description: Choose the Sonic model to use. Click Submit to continue to language and generation settings.

data_description.default_emotion: Emotional tone guidance. Applies to Sonic 3 and Sonic Turbo.

voice.title: Select a default voice
voice.description: Showing {voice_count} voices for {language}. Select a voice and click Submit to save, or select 'Go back to settings' to return.

error.invalid_auth: That API key was not accepted by Cartesia. Please double-check your key at play.cartesia.ai/keys and try again.
error.cannot_connect: Could not reach the Cartesia API. Please check your internet connection and try again.
error.voice_required: Please select a voice before saving.

abort.already_configured: Cartesia Sonic TTS is already configured. Only one instance is supported. To change settings, use the Configure button on the existing integration.

init.title: Select a voice model
init.description: Choose the Sonic model to use. Click Submit to continue to language and generation settings.

data_description.default_emotion: Emotional tone guidance. Applies to Sonic 3 and Sonic Turbo.

voice.title: Select a default voice
voice.description: Showing {voice_count} voices for {language}. Select a voice and click Submit to save, or select 'Go back to settings' to return.

error.voice_required: Please select a voice before saving.
